title: RandomMobBoost
description: Give a Chance Reinforcement Every Mob.
body:
Every spawn %15 chance get boost spawning mob

Boosted mobs gets a name according to strength

Armed mobs gets effect strength potion

Healthy mobs can regenerate (sometimes they can defy death :D)

Armored mobs gets effect resistance

Super mobs gets a lot of effect

If boosted mobs die, create lingering potion area with effect it has
